themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "But the people of the land slew all them that had conspired against king Amon; and the people...".
